overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic rain-soaked Night City through covered urban overpasses, elevated highways, and foggy coastal roads lined with palm trees. The scene features heavy atmospheric fog, neon-lit cyberpunk architecture, and moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban arterial beneath concrete overpasses

events.description: vehicle accelerates from 6 mph to 20 mph while navigating under concrete overpasses

agents.ego_description: accelerating through covered urban street beneath overpasses, navigating the wet road surface

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance through the covered section

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass forming a tunnel-like canopy over the road
large digital billboard displaying 'PURE OVERKILL' text with orange and white graphics
glowing neon signs attached to building facades with cyan and magenta colors
tall modern building with reflective glass windows showing rain droplets

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked urban canyon beneath massive concrete overpasses in a cyberpunk city. Neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the foggy atmosphere while the vehicle accelerates along the multi-lane road, following a car ahead through the sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway through dense commercial district

events.description: exits the covered overpass section onto an elevated highway with open sides and visible skyline
navigating through moderate traffic density with multiple vehicles visible ahead and to the sides

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on elevated highway, maneuvering between other vehicles in moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: red vehicle ahead slowing down in traffic flow
vehicle overtaking on the right side of the highway

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the left edge of the elevated highway
large digital screen displaying animated advertisements on building facade
tall skyscrapers forming the dense urban skyline visible along the highway
floating holographic advertisement projecting above the street level

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges onto an elevated highway cutting through the dense urban core, surrounded by towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements. Moderate traffic flows in both directions as the car maintains speed along the rain-slicked road, with the city skyline visible through the heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway approaching open wasteland with palm tree silhouettes

events.description: leaving the dense urban district for an open coastal road with visible palm trees and expansive sky
heavy fog and atmospheric haze obscure the distant palm tree silhouettes against the teal sky

agents.ego_description: driving along foggy coastal road, navigating gentle curves while leaving the city behind

entered.detail: tall palm trees silhouetted against the foggy sky along the coastal road
dense atmospheric fog and haze reducing visibility of distant objects
metal guardrail along the right side of the coastal highway
faint silhouettes of distant buildings visible through the heavy fog

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the dense cyberpunk metropolis to a foggy coastal highway lined with palm tree silhouettes. The environment opens up to reveal a desolate, atmospheric landscape with heavy fog obscuring the horizon and a teal-tinted sky visible above, as the vehicle continues along the winding road past the city limits.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban canyon into a desolate, fog-shrouded coastal landscape. It begins beneath massive concrete overpasses where the vehicle accelerates through a rain-soaked corridor illuminated by digital billboards and glowing neon signs. As the car emerges from the sheltered underpass, the scene opens onto an elevated highway cutting through the dense urban core, surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements visible through the heavy mist. The environment then shifts away from the metropolis, with the towering architecture giving way to a winding highway lined with the silhouettes of palm trees. Finally, the city skyline vanishes entirely as the road leads into a desolate coastal expanse under a teal-tinted sky, with thick fog obscuring the distant horizon.
